name: cdh_severe
description: term 3.5 kg neonate with severe left-sided congenital diaphragmatic hernia, pre-capillary (PVR-dominant) phenotype: marked asymmetric pulmonary hypoplasia (left>right), suprasystemic pulmonary vascular resistance with dominant right-to-left ductal and atrial shunting and differential cyanosis; intubated and ventilated on FiO2 1.0

Drugs.name: Drugs
Drugs.description: pharmacology (PK/PD) controller — Milestone 1: adrenaline → heart rate

LA.name: LA
LA.description: timevarying elastance model of the left atrium

RAIVCI.name: RAIVCI
RAIVCI.description: timevarying elastance model of the right atrium

RASVC.name: RASVC
RASVC.description: timevarying elastance model of the right atrium

LV.name: LV
LV.description: timevarying elastance model of the left ventricle

RV.name: RV
RV.description: timevarying elastance model of the right ventricle

Hormones.name: Hormones
Hormones.description: RAAS / ADH neuro-hormonal volume & osmolality control

EF_SVR.name: EF_SVR
EF_SVR.description: ans effector pathway on systemic vascular resistance

EF_HEART.name: EF_HEART
EF_HEART.description: ans effector pathway on heart through B2 receptors

EF_MV.name: EF_MV
EF_MV.description: ans effector pathway on minute volume

Mob.name: Mob
Mob.description: myocardial oxygen balance v2 (basal + stroke-work, mmol O2/g)

COR.name: COR
COR.description: timevarying elastance model of the coronaries

AA_COR.name: AA_COR
AA_COR.description: resistor model of the connection between ascending aorta and the coronaries

COR_RAIVCI.name: COR_RAIVCI
COR_RAIVCI.description: resistor model of the connection between the coronaries and the right atrium

COR_RASVC.name: COR_RASVC
COR_RASVC.description: resistor model of the connection between the coronaries and the right atrium

HeartFunction.name: HeartFunction
HeartFunction.description: load-induced ventricular contractility compromise (afterload mismatch + dilation, acute + remodeling)

VENT_GASIN.name: VENT_GASIN
VENT_GASIN.description: gas capacitance model of the gas reservoir of the mechanical ventilator

VENT_GASCIRCUIT.name: VENT_GASCIRCUIT
VENT_GASCIRCUIT.description: gas capacitance model of the gas volume inside the tubing of the mechanical ventilator

VENT_GASOUT.name: VENT_GASOUT
VENT_GASOUT.description: gas capacitance model of the return gas reservoir of the mechanical ventilator

VENT_INSP_VALVE.name: VENT_INSP_VALVE
VENT_INSP_VALVE.description: gas resistor model of the inspiratory valve of the mechanical ventilator

VENT_ETTUBE.name: VENT_ETTUBE
VENT_ETTUBE.description: gas resistor model of the endotracheal tube

VENT_EXP_VALVE.name: VENT_EXP_VALVE
VENT_EXP_VALVE.description: gas resistor model of the expiratory valve of the mechanical ventilator

PAAL.name: PAAL
PAAL.description: model of the pulmonary arterioles of the left lung

PAAR.name: PAAR
PAAR.description: capacitance model of the pulmonary arterioles of the right lung

AA.name: AA
AA.description: capacitance model of the ascending aorta

AD.name: AD
AD.description: capacitance model of the descending aorta

RLB.name: RLB
RLB.description: capacitance model of the blood compartment of the lower body

VLB.name: VLB
VLB.description: model of the extrathoracic venous blood compartment of the lower body

IVCI.name: IVCI
IVCI.description: model of the intrathoracic part of the inferior vena cava

RUB.name: RUB
RUB.description: model of the blood compartment of the upper body

VUB.name: VUB
VUB.description: model of the extrathoracic venous blood compartment of the upper body

SVC.name: SVC
SVC.description: model of the superior vena cava

PL_UMB_ART.name: PL_UMB_ART
PL_UMB_ART.description: capacitance model of the umbilical arteries

PL_UMB_VEN.name: PL_UMB_VEN
PL_UMB_VEN.description: capacitance model of the connection between the fetal placenta and the inferior vena cava (umbilical vein)

PL_MAT.name: PL_MAT
PL_MAT.description: capacitance model of the blood on the maternal side of the placenta

PL_GASEX.name: PL_GASEX
PL_GASEX.description: blood diffusor model of the diffusion across the placenta

ECLS_GAS_SOURCE.name: ECLS_GAS_SOURCE
ECLS_GAS_SOURCE.description: gas source of the oxygenator of the ecls

ECLS_GAS_OXY.name: ECLS_GAS_OXY
ECLS_GAS_OXY.description: gas part of the oxygenator of the ecls

ECLS_GAS_INSP_VALVE.name: ECLS_GAS_INSP_VALVE
ECLS_GAS_INSP_VALVE.description: gas resistor model of the connection between the gas source and the oxygenator

ECLS_GAS_EXP_VALVE.name: ECLS_GAS_EXP_VALVE
ECLS_GAS_EXP_VALVE.description: gas resistor model of the connection between the oxygenator nad outside world

ECLS_GAS_OUT.name: ECLS_GAS_OUT
ECLS_GAS_OUT.description: gas outlet of the oxygenator of the ecls

ECLS_GASEX.name: ECLS_GASEX
ECLS_GASEX.description: gas exchanger model of the blood-gas connection of the left lung

MOUTH.name: MOUTH
MOUTH.description: capacitance model of the air at the mouth

MOUTH_DS.name: MOUTH_DS
MOUTH_DS.description: gas resistor model of the connection between the mouth and dead space (airways)

DS.name: DS
DS.description: capacitance model of the dead space

DS_ALL.name: DS_ALL
DS_ALL.description: gas resistor model of the connection between the dead space and the alveolar left lung

DS_ALR.name: DS_ALR
DS_ALR.description: gas resistor model of the connection between the dead space and the alveolar left lung

ALL.name: ALL
ALL.description: gas capacitance model of the alveolar space of the left lung

ALR.name: ALR
ALR.description: gas capacitance model of the alveolar space of the right lung

THORAX.name: THORAX
THORAX.description: container model the thoracic rib cage

GASEX_LL.name: GASEX_LL
GASEX_LL.description: gas exchanger model of the blood-gas connection of the left lung

GASEX_RL.name: GASEX_RL
GASEX_RL.description: gas exchanger model of the blood-gas connection of the right lung

model_definition.name: cdh_severe
model_definition.description: term 3.5 kg neonate with severe left-sided congenital diaphragmatic hernia, pre-capillary (PVR-dominant) phenotype: marked asymmetric pulmonary hypoplasia (left>right), suprasystemic pulmonary vascular resistance with dominant right-to-left ductal and atrial shunting and differential cyanosis; intubated and ventilated on FiO2 1.0
